In this lesson, we're going to talk about the Six Figure Funnel Formula Lead Magnet Offer Page. Now, remember, this is the very first page of your funnel. This is the entrance point to your entire funnel. This is the page that your traffic gets sent to, your paid traffic, your media buying. This is the entire entry point of your funnel. Let's talk about the five different elements of a Six Figure Funnel Formula Lead Magnet Offer Page. First we have the pre-head headline. I'm going to show you an example of this broken down in just a second. We've got the pre-head headline. We've got the email opt-in field. We have a call to action button. We have an anti-spam statement. Then we have the privacy policy and terms link. What you can see right here is an example of an ultra simple page. Now, I'll tell you something. This is a screenshot from a mock Six Figure Funnel Formula Lead Magnet Offer Page. This page happens to come from a tool that I'm going to show you later on called Lead Pages. I can tell you that in the 10 plus years that I've been marketing online in a variety of different niches and markets, selling a variety of different products and services and programs, I can tell you that this format of a squeeze page, this format of a lead magnet offer page outpoles everything we've tested it against constantly. This was the control in one of my companies for years. We tested it out the Wazoo to see if we can beat it and we couldn't. Today for marketingfunnelautomation.com, this is also the control format. Let's break this down so you can see the five elements and I'm going to walk you through this. You can see right off the bat that over here, we've got the pre-headline and then we've got the headline. I want to point something out to you that we use the pre-headline to identify who it is that we are talking to, who it is that is our target prospect. You want to be as specific as possible. This might be where we would say attention those 54 years and older behind in your retirement savings. We're using this as an identifier for the market. The main headline is where we've got what is being offered, the fact that it is free information. We're going to put the word free. If it was a PDF, whatever, we would put that right up here. You're going to use a video and I'll explain why later on, but free video. Over here, what we've got in the rest of the main headline is the hook and the promise. All we're doing is we're taking the hook and promise that you developed earlier on in module one and now we are translating it into a headline. Over here, we've got again how to train any dog to sit in less than six minutes using this weird 12 word command. You know again that you've got, this is the whole hook falls with this weird 12 word command. How you're able to do this with a weird 12 word command. The actual 12 word command is the unique mechanism, the weird 12 word command. The big promise is how to train any dog to sit in less than six minutes. Like I said, we've got the next section, which is right here, which is the email opt-in field. We're going to break all of these down. Don't have no fear. We're going to break each of these components down. I'm going to show you how to build this the whole nine. The next one is the call to action button, which is right here. Then of course, we've got the anti-spam over here and then we've got your policies and terms. This is an example of a six-figure funnel formula lead magnet offer page. These are the five different elements that you're going to use, that you're going to incorporate into the page. Here's how it would look. It quite simply now is this is the lead magnet offer page. When somebody enters their email address in here, they get sent to the very next page. The very next page is what we call your customer captivation offer page.
